[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000101 2
1 1011010 4
2 0001000 1
3 0000101 2
4 0011111 5
5 0000010 1
6 0000110 2
7 0100100 2

01 10 0000010 1 match 5
12 21 0000000 a
23 32 0000100 1
34 43 0000010 1 match 5
45 54 0001010 2
56 65 0001101 3
67 76 0011100 3
70 07 0011100 3

13 31 0000010 1 match 5
24 42 0000000 a
35 53 0000111 3
46 64 0011000 2
57 75 0001100 2

71 17 0000000 a

47 74 0011000 2

61 16 0000000 a
72 27 0000100 1

37 73 0000100 1
